connection.execute(
        text(
            """
            SELECT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM task_dependencies td
                INNER JOIN tasks t ON t.id = td.depends_on_task_id
                WHERE td.task_id = :task_id AND t.status <> 'done'
            )
            """
        ),
        {"task_id": task_id},
    ).scalar
